overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The player moves from a covered plaza past a 'FOURTH WALL' sign, transitions to a waterfront promenade under an overpass, and ascends stairs following an NPC in red clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza between commercial buildings

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered plaza toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the illuminated billboards at the far end

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan neon sign reading 'FOURTH WALL' mounted on the building facade
tall concrete building with the neon sign and dark entrance
modern building with large windows and exterior planters
rectangular concrete planters containing tall grasses and tropical plants
large illuminated digital screens displaying advertisements at the plaza exit

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban plaza at night, passing the prominent cyan 'FOURTH WALL' neon sign on the left building. The path is flanked by modern buildings and planters with tall vegetation, leading toward bright digital billboards visible at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting the covered plaza into the open waterfront area with view of skyscrapers
passing by individuals sitting on the ground near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing seated individuals near the water

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the concrete ground near the waterfront edge

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure with support columns spanning across the waterfront
dark water surface reflecting the city lights and overpass structure
large cubic concrete blocks placed along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered plaza into an open waterfront area beneath a massive elevated overpass. The scene reveals dark water on the right, concrete bollards along the path, and several individuals sitting on the ground near the water's edge. Skyscrapers with illuminated windows rise in the background.

events.description: turning right toward the stairway leading up from the waterfront

agents.ego_description: following the waterfront path and approaching a stairway with a character in red clothing visible ahead

notable_agents.action: character in red clothing walking ahead on the path toward the stairs

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with illuminated windows and open levels
wide concrete stairway with metal railings ascending to upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront walkway beneath the overpass, with a parking garage visible on the right. The path curves toward a concrete stairway ascending to an upper level. A character in red clothing walks ahead toward the stairs, and the bridge structure shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated concrete stairway ascending to upper city level

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete stairs following the character in red
passing under brighter building illumination near the top of the stairway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following the character in red upward toward the upper plaza

notable_agents.action: character in red clothing ascending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall modern building with grid-patterned illuminated windows and green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete stairway from the waterfront level, following the character in red ahead. The stairs are flanked by a modern office building with illuminated windows on the right. The lighting becomes brighter near the top of the ascent, with skyscrapers visible in the background against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor into an expansive waterfront district and up toward a brightly lit upper level. It begins by moving through a covered plaza, passing a cyan Fourth Wall neon sign and planters of tall vegetation while heading toward distant digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the plaza, the environment opens up beneath a massive elevated overpass, revealing dark water, concrete bollards, and figures resting by the shore against a backdrop of illuminated skyscrapers. The path then curves along the waterfront past a parking garage before turning toward a concrete stairway where a character in red clothing leads the way. Finally, the camera ascends the wide stairs alongside a modern office building, moving from the shadows of the overpass into the brighter light of the city's upper reaches.
